O0500D_BED_MBLTY_TRNG_NUM O0500D Restorative Nursing: Bed Mobility Training Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the resident received bed mobility training for at least 15 minutes a day in the last seven days. 0 Minimum
7 Maximum
- Not assessed/no information
543 O0500E_TRNSFR_TRNG_NUM O0500E_TRNSFR_TRNG_NUM O0500E Restorative Nursing: Transfer Training Number CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the resident received transfer
